descriptions.Forget all WiFi networks: disconnect and clear all saved networks
descriptions.Reset RetroArch hotkeys: reapply spruce default RA hotkey layout
descriptions.Reset RetroArch config: restore spruce default RA config for current device
descriptions.Reset DraStic config: restore spruce default NDS config for current device
descriptions.Reset PCSX ReARMed config: restore spruce default PSX standalone config
descriptions.Reset PPSSPP config: restore spruce default PPSSPP hotkeys and config
descriptions.Clean up macOS dotfiles: delete any junk files created by macOS
descriptions.Repair SD Card: reboot and attempt an fsck.fat on your card
descriptions.Bug report: collect logs and other info for bug reports
descriptions.Scan ScummVM games: create .scummvm files for games in Roms/SCUMMVM
descriptions.Clear all Recents: delete your recently played games list
